name: Public Joint Stock Company Saratovenergo
summary: Public Joint Stock Company Saratovenergo supplies electricity in the Saratov region, Russia. It serves approximately 22,000 legal entities and 660,000 household subscribers. The company was formerly known as Energy and Electrification Joint-Stock Company Saratovenergo and changed its name to Public Joint Stock Company Saratovenergo in June 2015. The company was founded in 1933 and is based in Saratov, Russia. Public Joint Stock Company Saratovenergo is a subsidiary of Public Joint Stock Company Inter RAO UES.
